args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
prepare_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- prepare replay-safe-closure --out "$bundle_dir")
printf '%s' "$prepare_out" | grep -q 'intent=replay_safe_closure'
printf '%s' "$prepare_out" | grep -q 'readiness=Performance'
grep -q '"closure_outcome":"full_compile_closure"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"verify_replay_compile_free":true' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
printf 'prepared-replay-safe\n'
